conversations.ai_response: Great! The web interface is working perfectly. You can see this conversation is being automatically logged with timestamps and response times.

conversations.user_input: How does the logging work in the web app?
conversations.ai_response: The web application uses the same ConversationLogger class as the CLI version. Each message exchange is automatically saved to a JSON file with session tracking, timestamps, and response time metrics.

conversations.user_input: Can I see the conversation history?
conversations.ai_response: Yes! You can use the view_conversations.py script to see all your chat history. It supports various options like --recent for the latest conversation, --stats for analytics, and --search to find specific topics.

Privacy is built-in! All conversation logs are stored locally and excluded from git commits via .gitignore. Your conversations remain private on your machine while still providing full logging functionality.
Thank you! The combination of automatic logging, privacy protection, and comprehensive analytics makes this a robust chat system for both development and production use.
